text: ‘The soul’s pure milk’; some would render the Greek here, ‘the pure milk of the word’.
Ps. 117.22. ‘Prized, then, by you, the believers’; according to some commentators, this should be ‘The honour, then, belongs to you, the believers’.
‘To have mercy on them’; literally, ‘to visit them’, but the sense here is probably that which the verb has in Lk. 1.68.
‘Of injustice’; the Greek here has, ‘of a just judge’, that is, his heavenly Father.
‘Your shepherd, who keeps watch’; literally, ‘the shepherd and overseer (or bishop) of your souls’.
